title: Pass 5.D.1: ferrotorch-ml 39 perfect-prediction tautologies in src/metrics.rs::tests
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-ml audit, TEST_INTEGRITY.

src/metrics.rs::tests (lines 1177-1578) — **39 inline tests are tautologies**: r2_perfect_prediction_is_one, accuracy_score_perfect_match, matthews_corrcoef_perfect_is_one, cohen_kappa_perfect_is_one, roc_auc_perfect_separation, d2_brier_perfect_score_is_one, ndcg_perfect_ranking_is_one, nmi_perfect_clustering_is_one, homogeneity_completeness_v_measure_consistent, fowlkes_mallows_perfect_match_is_one. All compute metric(y, y) and assert ≈ 1.0/0.0. A constant-returning stub passes them.

Note #1015 closed the *conformance-file* discrimination guards; the *in-src* tautologies were not in scope and remain.

Acceptance:
- For each metric, add at least one mixed-fixture discriminating test (sklearn-fixture pattern). Keep the perfect-fixture sanity check but rename to *_sanity to disambiguate.
- Sabotage probe: confirm a constant-returning impl breaks the new test.
